<!-- generated by gitdocs -->
---
title: "Enable Proxy Mode"
category: Implementation
last_updated: 2026-04-25
---

Overview
1. Routes Claude Code traffic through a local proxy (`http://127.0.0.1:9801`) so the `claude-code-cache-fix` pipeline extensions can stabilize prefix/cache behavior.
2. Provides manual commands and an auto-start UX so proxy mode can be enabled per VS Code window/session.

How It Works
1. On activate (or when user runs `claude-code-cache-fix.enableProxy`), the extension calls `applyProxyBaseUrl()` to set `process.env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL = DEFAULT_PROXY_URL` (or prompt/restore if a pre-existing non-proxy value exists).
2. The extension runs `ensureProxyExtensionsConfig()` to write the proxy `extensions.json` override (mirrors v3.1.0 defaults and applies per-setting opt-outs).
3. `startProxyServer()` is invoked; it computes spawn env via `computeProxyEnv()` and spawns the proxy script (`proxy/server.mjs`) from the installed `claude-code-cache-fix` package.
4. Proxy is kept as a managed child process (`proxyProcess`), and status/logging are surfaced to the extension output channel.
5. On disable or `deactivate()`, `restoreProxyBaseUrl()` restores the saved `process.env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` (or deletes it) and `stopProxyServer()` stops the child process.

Configuration
- `claude-code-cache-fix.autoStartProxy` (boolean, default: `true`)
  - When `true`, proxy auto-starts on activate for that VS Code window/session.
- `claude-code-cache-fix.enableProxy` / command `claude-code-cache-fix.enableProxy`
  - Manual enable command; equivalent to invoking `enableProxy()`.
- `claude-code-cache-fix.disableProxy` / command `claude-code-cache-fix.disableProxy`
  - Manual disable command; calls `disableProxy()` which restores `process.env` and stops the proxy.
- Notes:
  - Proxy routing is session-scoped (per-extension-host/process). `autoStartProxy` reapplies across restarts; nothing is persisted to `settings.json` by v0.7.2.

Source Files
- `extension.js` (functions: `applyProxyBaseUrl`, `restoreProxyBaseUrl`, `enableProxy`, `disableProxy`, `startProxyServer`, `stopProxyServer`)
- `package.json` (contributes `claude-code-cache-fix.autoStartProxy` and commands)
- `CHANGELOG.md` / `RELEASE_NOTES_v072.md` (rationale and migration notes)

Related
- See also: ../auto-architecture/proxy-subsystem.md
